Mechanical Takeoff · Report Generator
Drop a takeoff, get a dashboard
Upload an Excel takeoff or a Bluebeam CSV export and this builds an interactive report — building riser, product & supplier breakdowns, a searchable schedule, and project intelligence. Drop a CSV and it also generates your formatted takeoff workbook automatically. Everything runs in your browser; nothing is uploaded anywhere.
Pick the customer. Each profile auto-detects whether the file is unit-type (UNITS column populated) or a regular takeoff and applies that customer's matching layout.

Drag an .xlsx or Bluebeam .csv here

or browse your computer

Reading file…

Two ways in. Drop a Bluebeam CSV (Markups Summary export with columns like Subject, Label, Count, BRAND, MODEL, Page Index) and the tool builds the dashboard and generates a formatted .xlsx takeoff (DATA + TAKEOFF sheets, your colors). Or drop an existing Excel takeoff — a flat sheet with a PRODUCT column and a count column (QTY / Count / MULTIPLIER COUNT / Total); TAG, BRAND, MODEL, sizes, TYPE, Page Index and a floor column are used when present.
